title: BELGIUM enforcement action against Technology Company (177,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Belgian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 177,000 on a technology company. The controller failed to delete a former employee's email account, resulting in personal data being processed without sufficient legal basis. The controller only deactivated the email account after a certain period of ti...
